title: Number of Submatrices That Sum to Target
titleCn: 元素和为目标值的子矩阵数量

testcases.input: matrix = [[0,1,0],[1,1,1],[0,1,0]], target = 0 Output: 4 Explanation: The four 1x1 submatrices that only contain 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The four 1x1 submatrices that only contain 0.

testcases.input: matrix = [[1,-1],[-1,1]], target = 0 Output: 5 Explanation: The two 1x2 submatrices, plus the two 2x1 submatrices, plus the 2x2 submatrix.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The two 1x2 submatrices, plus the two 2x1 submatrices, plus the 2x2 submatrix.
